signed_identity.signature_rule: content_hash must be the sha256 hash of the canonical tuple; signature must verify over content_hash

anchor_dependency.keel_attested_unsigned: only when the verified self-attesting bundle body contains an accepted published_checkpoint anchor
anchor_dependency.keel_self_signed_unanchored: used for unsigned rows in a verified self-attesting bundle without an accepted body anchor
anchor_dependency.signed_identity: valid signed identity evidence outranks bundle anchor state

body.conflict_behavior: contradictory signed and unsigned linkage tuples are disproved
body.minimum_grade_behavior: a required minimum_trust_grade above the emitted grade is insufficient_evidence
